channel.title: 1d on Colin Bousige
channel.description: Recent content in 1d on Colin Bousige

item.title: 1D Materials
item.description: Collapsed nanotubes of large diameter: a new model 1D system Carbon nanotubes under extreme pressure Carbon peapods Collapsed nanotubes of large diameter: a new model 1D system More details soon! Carbon nanotubes under extreme pressure More details soon! Carbon peapods My PhD research was focused on the study of the one-dimensional (1D) system that are the carbon nano-peapods. During my work, I primarily used inelastic neutron scattering and x-ray diffraction in order to investigate the structure and dynamics of this system.
